name: Cridex / Feodo banking trojan (cridex.vmem)
description: Canonical Volatility Foundation public memory sample (Windows XP SP2 x86). Cridex/Feodo: code injected into explorer.exe (PID 1484) and a reader_sl.exe (PID 1640) spawned as a child of explorer (anomalous), with C2 beacons from explorer.exe to 41.168.5.140:8080 and 125.19.103.198:8080.
source: Volatility Foundation public memory sample — cridex.vmem
